expectedIssues: The word Jackpots is misspelled Jacpots
reportedIssues: Content appears to overflow horizontally. The game grid shows a partially cut-off third column on the right, with game cards clipped by the screen edge.
The category navigation row is clipped on the right; the “Hot Games” tab is only partially visible.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the lower game content, making the bottom row of cards appear partially hidden behind the nav bar.
Some card overlays, such as info icons and jackpot text, sit very close to card edges and can feel cramped or partially obscured on small screens.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues mention text misspelling or the word 'Jackpots'; all reported issues describe layout and overflow problems.
